Mtn To Strike Claim
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PAMELA A. UNDERWOOD, ASST. DISTRICT ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 551-9544 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ROMMIE WHITTAKER, RESPONDENT, APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Strike Claim of Rommie Whittaker is granted with 20 days leave to amend. Amended claim needs to be verified and filed by December 17, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR # 4761 = (302/MJM)

Mtn To Strike Claim
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Continued To Nov-27-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ROMMIE WHITTAKER, TEL. NO. 948-5469, RESPONDENT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Strike Claim of Rommie Whittaker is continued to November 27, 2012 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302. Mr. Whittaker to give notice of the new hearing date in writing to the District Attorney and on the date of the hearing to bring proof that notice was given. Mr. Whittaker may file a written opposition. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/MJM)
